name: Mortal Reminder

passives.name: Grievous Wounds
passives.effects: Dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemy champions inflicts them with {{tip|Grievous Wounds}} for 3 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Physical damage to enemy champions applies Grievous Wounds for 3 seconds.

simpleDescription: Overcomes enemies with high Health recovery and Armor

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Grievous Wounds is applied whenever the holder deals physical damage to an enemy champion and refreshes to a 3-second duration.
Player-visible behavior: anti-heal uptime is tied to continued damage cadence on champion targets.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League Wiki (Mortal Reminder)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of physical-damage trigger scope and Grievous Wounds duration semantics
